summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HACCP-Kontroll-App. All core functionality working correctly. Backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend integration fully functional. Dashboard statistics, item management, checklist operations, and history tracking all working as expected.

design_issues.issue: PDF export functionality is mocked - shows success toast but doesn't generate actual PDF

passed_tests: Dashboard statistics display (total items, checks today/week/month)
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Checkliste, Geräte, Historie)
Add new cleaning items with name and interval selection
Display items in manage items table
Checklist functionality with employee initials input
Perform cleaning checks and save to database
History display with timestamps and employee initials
All backend API endpoints (items CRUD, checks CRUD, dashboard stats)
Responsive UI elements with proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, PDF export mocked)

action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Implement actual PDF export functionality to replace the current mocked implementation. All core HACCP functionality is working perfectly.
